subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is but a letter from among the letters of Thy creative Pen, seeking the Most Exalted Word which the Manifestation of Thy Essence hath uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی هذه حرف من حروفات قلم انشائک ارادت کلمة العلیا الذی نطق بها مظهر ذاتک و منزل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
